reasoning: At 8x zoom, the health bar frame shows several AI generation tells. (1) Outline inconsistency: the black border varies between 1px and 2px thickness along the frame edge, with a few spots where the outline appears absent or blended into the background. (2) Gradient shading: the gold/orange frame body uses soft gradient transitions rather than the clean 2-3 hard tone steps expected from intentional pixel art. (3) Color bleed / noise pixels: isolated teal/blue-green pixels appear near the bottom-center of the frame in a pattern that does not correspond to any discernible decorative gem placement — they read as orphaned color bleed rather than intentional ornamentation. (4) Asymmetry: the left and right terminal decorations of the frame are not mirror-symmetric; the right end appears slightly wider and the diagonal hatching inside shifts phase. (5) Sub-pixel edge blending: several edge pixels carry intermediate gray values consistent with upscale anti-aliasing rather than clean pixel placement. Mitigating factors: the overall silhouette is coherent, the diamond cross-hatch fill pattern is recognisable as a design motif, and the palette is limited. However the combination of inconsistent outlines, soft gradients, color bleed, and asymmetry tips the image into marginal territory rather than a clean pass.
